name: Comanche International Public Company Limited
summary: Comanche International Public Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, provides information technology solutions for hotels and serviced apartments. It offers hospitality industry management systems with integrated modules, such as front office, point of sale, call accounting, back office with accounts payable, accounts receivable, general ledger, and inventory control. The company also sells computers and computer software, as well as provides maintenance services and other services relating to computer software. It operates in Thailand, Myanmar, Vietnam, Laos, Australia, Cambodia, Hong Kong, Macau, China, Japan, Indonesia, the Philippines, Maldives, Malaysia, Taiwan, India, Sri Lanka, and Singapore. The company was incorporated in 2003 and is based in Bangkok, Thailand.
